info.name: PMO Dashboard — Phase JB Smoke Gate (COI Public Module)
info.description:
Smoke validation gate for Phase JB: COI Module Enhancement — public read-only endpoints.

GATES:
  JB-V4a: 20-A — GET /api/public/construction-projects returns 200 with data array
  JB-V4b: 20-B — GET /api/public/construction-projects/:id returns 200 for published project
  JB-V4c: 20-B — response publication_status === 'PUBLISHED'
  JB-V4d: 20-C — GET /api/public/construction-projects/:id/gallery returns 200 array
  JB-V4e: 20-D — GET /api/public/construction-projects/<bad-uuid> returns 404
  JB-V4f: 20-E — all public endpoints accept requests WITH no Authorization header
  JB-V6a: 21-A — authenticated GET /api/construction-projects still works (regression)
  JB-V6b: 21-B — authenticated GET /api/construction-projects/:id still works (regression)

EXECUTION ORDER (STRICT):
  00-A → 00-B
    → 20-A → 20-B → 20-C → 20-D → 20-E
    → 21-A → 21-B
    → 99-A

PRE-CONDITIONS:
  - Backend running at {{base_url}} (default http://localhost:3000)
  - At least one construction project with publication_status = 'PUBLISHED' exists in the database
  - Admin credentials valid (used by 00-A)

STOP ON FIRST HARD-GATE FAILURE (20-A through 20-D are hard gates).
21-A/21-B are regression gates — failure here means JB broke the authenticated controller.

variable.description: Published construction project UUID — auto-set by 00-B

request.description: Authenticate as Admin. Populates {{token}} for seeding 00-B and regression tests 21-A/21-B.

item.name: 00-B: Seed project_id (via public list — no auth needed)

exec: pm.test('JB-PRE: 00-B at least one PUBLISHED project exists', () => {
pm.expect(rows.length, 'No PUBLISHED construction project found. Publish at least one project in the admin UI before running this gate.').to.be.at.least(1);

request.description: Seeds {{project_id}} from the public list endpoint (no auth). Using the public endpoint avoids the authenticated DTO whitelist — QueryConstructionProjectDto forbids unknown properties (publication_status is not a declared field). All results from the public endpoint are guaranteed PUBLISHED by the controller guard.

exec: pm.test('JB-V4a: response contains data array', () => pm.expect(rows).to.be.an('array'));
pm.test('JB-V4a: at least one project returned', () => pm.expect(rows.length, 'Empty list — is there a PUBLISHED project?').to.be.at.least(1));
pm.test('JB-V4a: all returned projects have publication_status=PUBLISHED (backend guard active)', () => pm.expect(allPublished).to.be.true);

request.description: HARD GATE. No Authorization header. PublicConstructionController forces publication_status=PUBLISHED internally — verify the backend guard is active regardless of query params.

item.name: 20-B: Get published project by ID (no auth)

request.description: HARD GATE. No Authorization header. Verifies findPublicOne() returns data AND that publication_status is PUBLISHED.

item.name: 20-C: Get gallery for published project (no auth)

exec: pm.test('JB-V4d: response has data array (paginated wrapper)', () => pm.expect(body.data).to.be.an('array'));
console.log('Gallery items returned:', body.data.length, '(0 is acceptable — project may have no images yet)');

request.description: HARD GATE. No Authorization header. Empty array is acceptable (project may have no gallery images). Non-200 or non-array is a failure.

HARD GATE. Uses a nil UUID that will never exist. Verifies findPublicOne() throws NotFoundException for unknown IDs. 400 (invalid UUID) would also mean ParseUUIDPipe rejected it — update test to accept [400, 404] if that occurs.

item.name: 20-E: Public list with spurious auth header still returns 200

exec: pm.test('JB-V4f: 20-E status 200 (Public decorator bypasses JwtAuthGuard)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description: Sends a deliberately bad Authorization header. The @Public() decorator must cause APP_GUARD to skip JWT validation entirely — a 401 here means @Public() is NOT working and the guard is enforcing auth on public routes.

exec: pm.test('JB-V6a: 21-A status 200 (authenticated list endpoint not broken)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description: REGRESSION. Verifies that adding PublicConstructionController to the module did not break the existing authenticated ConstructionProjectsController.

exec: pm.test('JB-V6b: 21-B status 200 (authenticated detail endpoint not broken)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('JB-V6b: 21-B returns publication_status field (Admin sees all statuses)', () => pm.expect(body).to.have.property('publication_status'));

request.description: REGRESSION. Admin-authenticated fetch of the same project used in folder 20. Should return the full record regardless of publication_status (Admin sees all).

exec: pm.test('JB-V6c: 21-C status 200 (authenticated gallery endpoint not broken)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('JB-V6c: 21-C returns paginated wrapper with data array', () => pm.expect(body.data).to.be.an('array'));
pm.test('JB-V6c: 21-C returns paginated wrapper with meta object', () => pm.expect(body.meta).to.be.an('object').with.property('total'));

request.description: REGRESSION. Verifies authenticated gallery endpoint on the original controller still functions.

exec: console.log('=== PHASE JB SMOKE GATE REPORT ===');
console.log('  20-A: Public list returns PUBLISHED projects (JB-V4a)');
console.log('  20-B: Public detail by ID returns 200 (JB-V4b)');
console.log('  20-F: Bad token still returns 200 on public route (JB-V4f)');
console.log('Report results back to operator. JB is COMPLETE when all gates pass.');

request.description: Sentinel request. Triggers gate summary console output. Results appear in Postman Console.
